description_long: This is a full-face helmet with a striking and detailed graphic design featuring a Roman or Spartan warrior motif on both sides, accented by dynamic yellow streaks and abstract black and white elements. The helmet's shell is predominantly white with gray shading, and the front is dominated by a large, glossy black visor that covers the entire face area. The top and rear of the helmet display geometric and emblematic details, including a circular logo at the back and a raised vent-like structure on the crown. The sides feature circular metallic elements, possibly mimicking vent covers or decorative screws. The surface finish is smooth and slightly glossy, with the graphics seamlessly integrated into the shell. The helmet appears robust and is likely constructed from composite materials typical of modern urban motorcycle or sports helmets.
description: A full-face helmet with a glossy black visor, white and gray shell, and bold yellow and black warrior-themed graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large black visor and the top vent structure, with yellow and black graphics visible on the upper sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the detailed warrior graphic, yellow streaks, and a circular metallic element near the visor.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the circular logo/emblem, geometric vent structure, and the continuation of the graphic design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with the warrior motif, yellow accents, and another circular metallic detail.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular emblem with a stylized helmet or face, located at the rear center of the helmet, black and white in color.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: One prominent vent structure on the top center; no other visible vents on the sides or rear.
attribute_graphic_design: Dynamic warrior motif with a Roman/Spartan helmet, yellow streaks, abstract black and white patterns, and a circular emblem at the back.
